overall.description: A first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through open ocean in a maritime simulator game. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar and sonar monitors, with the ship's bow visible through the window as it cuts through choppy waters under overcast, dim lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation controls overlooking bow

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring radar and navigation displays while maintaining course through open waters

entered.detail: digital chart display showing vessel position and map data
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing surrounding contacts
vertical sonar display showing water column and bottom depth
red-painted forward deck of the vessel with anchor equipment
white metal safety railings along the bow perimeter
dark structural window frame on the port side of the bridge
dark structural window frame on the starboard side of the bridge
choppy dark blue sea extending to the horizon
distant horizon where sea meets overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through choppy open ocean waters. Three navigation monitors display radar, charts, and sonar data at the top of the frame, while the bow cuts through the water ahead. The scene is dimly lit with overcast skies, and the camera remains stable as the ship progresses forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dim, overcast maritime environment. It begins with a view of the vessel moving steadily through choppy open ocean waters, where the bow cuts through the waves ahead. Above the horizon, three navigation monitors remain visible, displaying active radar, charts, and sonar data. The camera remains stable as the ship progresses forward, keeping the operational displays and the gray, turbulent sea in a constant, focused frame.
